title: eruca vesicaria var. longistyla
intro: Eruca vesicaria var. longistyla, also known as Long-styled garden rocket or Long-styled rocket, is a variety of the Eruca vesicaria plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain, due to the presence of compounds such as isothiocyanates and glucosinolates. The health benefits of Eruca vesicaria var. longistyla include its potential to protect against cancer, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Eruca vesicaria var. longistyla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used as a culinary ingredient in salads and other dishes.
